mapper.insert: insert into task (user_id, title, description, exp_reward, coin_reward, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{expReward}, #{coinReward}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update task set status = #{status}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
